{{Quote|Got that 'Q3' by undergoing the ceremonial Passage Rite at the semi-summer festival on Vintrus. Wait, was it Vintrus --? No, it wasn't the Passage Rite, it was -- well, maybe I don't remember.|An elder [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] reminiscing his younger years (perhaps erroneously)|<ref name="SWG:EQB">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Ebenn Q3 Baobab|Naboo}}</ref>}}
'''Vintrus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Manda sector/Legends|Manda Sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

The Planet was known to host the [[Semi-summer festival]]. [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] claimed that he acquired his "Q3" alias by undergoing the ceremonial [[Passage Rite]] at this festival.<ref name="SWG:EQB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vintrus was mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:EQB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
